intro.title: Documentation Overview
intro.description: QueryFlux docs — multi-engine SQL proxy for Trino, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Snowflake, and Flight. Routing, dialect translation, and observability in one place.

getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.description: Run QueryFlux with Docker Compose, connect SQL clients, smoke-test Trino HTTP routing, and open Studio in minutes.

studio.title: QueryFlux Studio
studio.description: Web UI for clusters, query history, routing, and admin security. Connects to the QueryFlux Admin API on port 9000.

configuration.title: YAML Configuration Reference
configuration.description: Complete config.yaml reference — frontends, cluster groups, routing rules, persistence, translation, and admin API settings.

architecture/overview.title: Architecture Overview
architecture/overview.description: Index of QueryFlux architecture docs — system design, SQL translation, routing, observability, and extending engine support.

architecture/motivation-and-goals.title: Motivation & Goals
architecture/motivation-and-goals.description: Why QueryFlux exists — fragmented engines, cost-aware routing, queueing at the proxy, and compute interoperability for lakehouses.

architecture/system-map.title: System Map
architecture/system-map.description: End-to-end QueryFlux architecture — frontends, router chain, cluster manager, translation, engine adapters, and persistence.

architecture/query-translation.title: Query Translation
architecture/query-translation.description: How QueryFlux converts SQL between dialects with sqlglot — when translation runs, supported dialects, and bypass rules.

architecture/routing-and-clusters.title: Routing & Cluster Groups
architecture/routing-and-clusters.description: Router chain, routingFallback, cluster groups, load-balancing strategies, concurrency limits, and proxy-side queueing.

architecture/query-tags.title: Query Tags
architecture/query-tags.description: Attach key/value metadata to queries for routing, Prometheus metrics, observability, and backend forwarding.

architecture/query-params.title: Query Parameters
architecture/query-params.description: Typed positional ? placeholders from Snowflake and other frontends through dispatch to native backend binding.

architecture/observability.title: Observability
architecture/observability.description: Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, QueryFlux Studio, and the Admin REST API for operational visibility.

architecture/adding-engine-support.title: Adding Engine Support
architecture/adding-engine-support.description: Extend QueryFlux with new backend engines or client protocol frontends — overview and links to detailed guides.

architecture/auth-authz-design.title: Auth & Authorization Design
architecture/auth-authz-design.description: Authentication providers, authorization policies, backend identity resolution, and the two-credential security model.

architecture/frontends/overview.title: Frontends Overview
architecture/frontends/overview.description: QueryFlux client protocols — Trino HTTP, PostgreSQL wire, MySQL wire, Flight SQL, and Snowflake on a shared dispatch path.

architecture/frontends/trino-http.title: Trino HTTP Frontend
architecture/frontends/trino-http.description: Trino-compatible HTTP frontend — async polling, nextUri rewriting, session headers, tags, and mixed-engine groups.

architecture/frontends/postgres-wire.title: PostgreSQL Wire Frontend
architecture/frontends/postgres-wire.description: PostgreSQL v3 wire protocol frontend — startup, simple query flow, session context, and psql compatibility.

architecture/frontends/mysql-wire.title: MySQL Wire Frontend
architecture/frontends/mysql-wire.description: MySQL wire protocol frontend — handshake, COM_QUERY, session variables, schema switching, and mysql client support.

architecture/frontends/flight-sql.title: Arrow Flight SQL Frontend
architecture/frontends/flight-sql.description: Arrow Flight SQL gRPC frontend — implemented RPCs, metadata passthrough, and Flight SQL client examples.

architecture/frontends/snowflake.title: Snowflake Frontend
architecture/frontends/snowflake.description: Snowflake HTTP wire and SQL API v2 on one port — SnowSQL, Python connector, and JDBC without a Snowflake account.

architecture/adding-support/overview.title: Extending QueryFlux Overview
architecture/adding-support/overview.description: Add a backend engine adapter or a new client protocol — Rust crates, Studio UI, and documentation checklist.

architecture/adding-support/frontend.title: Add a Frontend Protocol
architecture/adding-support/frontend.description: Step-by-step guide to adding a new client protocol listener, dispatch integration, and routing in QueryFlux.

architecture/adding-support/backend.title: Add a Backend Engine
architecture/adding-support/backend.description: Step-by-step guide to adding a query backend — Rust adapter, engine registration, persistence, and Studio UI.

development.title: Development Guide
development.description: Set up the Rust workspace, Python/sqlglot sidecar, Docker dependencies, and Makefile commands for QueryFlux development.

contribute.title: Contributing
contribute.description: Contribution guidelines for QueryFlux — PR conventions, code style, tests, documentation updates, and Apache 2.0 license.

benchmarks.title: Proxy Benchmarks
benchmarks.description: QueryFlux proxy overhead benchmarks — mock-backend latency for Trino HTTP and MySQL wire paths (~0.35 ms p50).

project-structure.title: Project Structure
project-structure.description: QueryFlux repository layout — Rust workspace crates, Studio UI, Docker examples, and documentation directories.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: QueryFlux project roadmap — shipped features, near-term priorities, and planned additions for routing and engine support.
